knowledge.insight: Hackney: 'I have not changed my fishing strategy at all for MLF. The one thing that will change is you probably will not leave a spot producing lots of bass to go look for bigger ones. But at the end of the day the angler who catches the most big bass will win.'
Hackney: 'I won the MLF World Championship in March 2018 flipping a Rodent. If it is not broken, do not try to fix it.'
